post.content:
Education: BTech in CSE from Tier-2 College
Years of Experience: 0
Batch : 2025
Internship Duration : Jan - July 2025
Prior Experience: Interned at Product Based Company
Date of the Offer: November 2024
Company: Uber
Title/Level: Software Engineering Intern
Location: Bangalore, or Hyderabad India

Stipend: Rs. 1,87,000 (inclusive of Rs.25,000 housing stipend/ month) + To and fro air tickets + Uber credits

Application: Applied through their carrier portal. Note: Uber usually keeps an opening for mass drives for just a day or two. So, try to check their portals regularly. Got an OA, 3 questions 90 minutes. Here, one of the patterns I observed was that the penultimate question is usually the toughest. So, keep that for the last. The level of the questions was (Leetcode Medium - Leetcode Hard - Leetcode Medium / Hard). I solved all three. Took 3 weeks to get the interview scheduled.

Interview Experience: All rounds were scheduled in the same day and got an offer after 2 working days. Pretty similar to standard Uber rounds. Round 1: DSA (2 Leetcode Hards, I coded the first question pretty fast, so I got asked a second question, which I also coded within the alloted time. I don't know if this helped me in anyway), Round 2: LLD (Parking Lot), Round 3: HM (Discussed previous internships, and questions about Uber). 

Advice to Juniors: Uber interview process is very time bound, they won't go even an minute beyond the allocated 45 minutes. So, for LLD try to write something bare bone as soon as possible. Don't spend too much time writing something which you know you won't be able to complete. Same for DSA, don't waste too much time if you know the solution already, directly code the most efficient solution.

If you guys have any questions feel free to drop them in the comments.
solved 2.5 ques in oa today. Any chance for interview?

hello sir.. i have cleared my uber round 2 in in-campus drive.. will there be again any coding round like live codding in uber round 3? or should i prepare for general hr and theeoritical explanatios?\n
I have yet not recieved any update my hr round went well too does that mean I am rejected \n\nP.S Congratulations .... uber it is
was your interview scheduled on thurs or friday? (14th/15th nov) on what date??
